## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] New project metadata
- [ ] Existing project metadata update
- [ ] UI / frontend change
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] CI or workflow change

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Manual check in local preview (`python -m http.server 8000`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `data/projects.json` remains valid JSON
- [ ] Links in changed project entries are correct
- [ ] `lastUpdated` is updated for changed entries
- [ ] Screenshots added (if UI changed)
